name: Luna
subtitle: A source for the Luna fork.
description: Luna is a media app fork with anime, manga, light novel, download, and playback-focused additions. The app ships without services or addons.

apps.name: Luna
apps.subtitle: Anime, manga, downloads, and playback tools.
apps.localizedDescription: A fork of Luna with expanded anime handling, AniList and Trakt sync, catalogs, downloads, Stremio addon support, manga mode, light novel support, and playback improvements. The app does not include services or addons.

versions.localizedDescription: Release build with stabilized media details and related anime specials support.
